detectors.description:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract BDC (BDC.sol#579-614) has payable functions:
	 - BDC.fallback() (BDC.sol#607-611)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
detectors.markdown:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract [BDC](BDC.sol#L579-L614) has payable functions:
	 - [BDC.fallback()](BDC.sol#L607-L611)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether

detectors.description: ERC223Token.transfer(address,uint256).empty (BDC.sol#537) is a local variable never initialized

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ERC223Token.transfer(address,uint256,bytes) (BDC.sol#483-513):
	External calls:
	- receiver.tokenFallback(msg.sender,_value,_data) (BDC.sol#505)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(msg.sender,_to,_value) (BDC.sol#509)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [ERC223Token.transfer(address,uint256,bytes)](BDC.sol#L483-L513):
	External calls:
	- [receiver.tokenFallback(msg.sender,_value,_data)](BDC.sol#L505)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [Transfer(msg.sender,_to,_value)](BDC.sol#L509)

detectors.description: solc-0.4.26 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.
detectors.markdown: solc-0.4.26 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.21 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.21 (BDC.sol#1)
